final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial banner photo for a Weibo news/hot-topic post, featuring an urban dusk cityscape.

Style/medium: documentary photojournalism, shot-on-smphone aesthetic with professional polish, sharp detail, photorealistic
Composition: wide panoramic 16:9 aspect ratio, horizontal sweep, generous negative space for text overlay, eye-level street perspective
Subject: silhouetted commuters in motion blur, foreground to midground depth, anonymous urban figures
Scene/backdrop: metropolitan skyline at golden hour transitioning to blue hour, distant skyscrapers reflecting amber sunset glow, neon signs beginning to illuminate storefronts
Lighting/mood: dramatic chiaroscuro, warm sunset backlighting against cool emerging neon, high contrast between natural and artificial light, authentic on-site atmosphere
Color palette: amber gold and burnt orange from sunset as base, electric blue and magenta neon as accent, deep shadow blacks
Materials/textures: wet pavement reflections, glass facade glints, motion blur on moving figures, crisp architectural edges
Text (verbatim): "城市里的安静时刻", "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙", "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察"
Constraints: must maintain 16:9 strict aspect ratio, ample horizontal breathing room for text overlay, professional news-grade composition
Avoid: oversaturated HDR, fake 8K stuffer aesthetic, watermarked stock photo look, plastic skin, deformed architecture, excessive sharpening
